objective.decision_needed: Find source-backed account trigger evidence before MDP fit, route, and brief generation.
objective.pack_hint: Use the active MDP pack ICP, personas, fit rules, signals, hooks, CTAs, and evals as the scoring authority after evidence collection.

agent_operating_plan.role: Public-source BDR scout operating plan for an autonomous agent runtime
operating_instructions: Start with the approved MDP pack boundaries. Do not broaden ICP, persona, trigger, or avoid-rule semantics from search results alone.
Use Exa for broad public discovery, Firecrawl only to normalize already accepted public URLs, and Apify only for public listing pages explicitly allowed by the operator.
For every candidate, preserve the exact source URL, title, observed date or publication date, bounded snippet, provider, and confidence before invoking MDP fit or brief steps.
Reject sources that require login, expose personal contact enrichment, bypass access controls, or only imply buying intent without an explicit GTM/research workflow signal.
stop_conditions: Stop when the candidate lacks the required receipts after one discovery pass and one cleanup pass.
Stop when all available evidence is gated, personal, stale without operator approval, or unrelated to the active pack primitives.
Stop before outreach, CRM mutation, or private data enrichment; this strategy only prepares reviewed evidence for MDP gates.
agent_operating_plan.insufficient_evidence_action: Do not qualify the candidate. Write a gap explaining which trigger, source receipt, or pack primitive could not be supported.
agent_operating_plan.downstream_handoff_prompt: When evidence passes review, run `mdp fit --context <candidate-with-evidence.json>`, then `mdp brief --context <fit-result.json>`, then `mdp check-claims --context <brief.json>`. Append to the ledger only after those checks preserve citations and unresolved gaps.

known: AI agent builders evaluating outbound or research workflows
gaps: Personal contact enrichment and private email discovery are out of scope.

known: Fit must be source-backed and pass MDP fit rules before any brief is useful.
evidence_needed: Operational pain, active project, hiring/funding/product signal, or public conversation tied to GTM workflow change
gaps: Budget, authority, and internal priorities remain gaps unless public or user-provided.

evidence_needed: Fresh source title, snippet, publication/observation date, content hash, and confidence score
gaps: Do not infer unstated buying intent from generic AI mentions.

evidence_needed: At least one cited source per candidate and explicit rationale tied to evidence IDs
gaps: CRM sync and outreach stay disabled unless an operator enables a reviewed connector path.

source_targets.target: Public web: company blogs, launch posts, docs, podcasts, founder posts indexed on the open web
source_targets.purpose: Discover account-level trigger evidence for teams adopting AI agents in GTM or research workflows.
source_targets.freshness: Prefer last 90 days; accept evergreen docs when paired with a fresh trigger.

source_targets.target: Public career pages and job posts
source_targets.purpose: Find hiring signals for GTM systems, RevOps automation, AI workflow, or agent tooling roles.
source_targets.freshness: Active or recently posted roles only

source_targets.purpose: Supply blessed ICP, persona, signal, avoid-rule, hook, CTA, and eval context for downstream scoring.
source_targets.allowed_access: Local pack files only; do not upload private pack contents to unapproved providers.

queries_prompts.query_or_prompt: ("AI SDR" OR "AI BDR" OR "GTM engineering" OR "RevOps automation" OR "AI agents") ("launch" OR "hiring" OR "workflow" OR "account research" OR "outbound") -"personal email" -login -"contact database"
queries_prompts.agent_instruction: Search the public web for fresh account-level GTM or research workflow trigger evidence. Return only candidates with a URL, title, date or observed_at, bounded snippet, and explicit mapping to one active MDP source signal.
construction_rules: Combine one ICP/persona term with one trigger family per query so evidence can be traced to a specific pack primitive.
Prefer primary company, careers, launch, docs, funding, and public founder/operator sources before generic listicles.
Add negative filters for personal contact data, login-required pages, private social pages, scraped directories, and enrichment databases.

queries_prompts.query_or_prompt: For accepted public URLs only, extract markdown or structured JSON needed to preserve the cited snippet, title, date, and content hash.
queries_prompts.agent_instruction: Fetch only the accepted public URLs from the discovery pass. Extract the smallest text span that supports the trigger, compute or preserve a content hash, and do not follow gated, private, or unrelated links.
construction_rules: Use the canonical URL from Exa or the public page itself; do not discover new domains from Firecrawl.
Extract evidence into normalized fields before any scoring step.
If a page blocks access or omits the trigger text, mark the candidate insufficient instead of substituting another claim.
negative_filters: do not collect personal contact data
do not bypass robots or access controls

queries_prompts.query_or_prompt: Use only operator-approved public listing pages to confirm company-level context such as active hiring or public product category. Do not collect personal profiles, emails, phone numbers, or authenticated social data.
queries_prompts.agent_instruction: Run this lane only when the operator explicitly approves the listing source class. Normalize company-level context and stop before personal contact enrichment.
construction_rules: Limit collection to public company or role metadata needed for MDP fit context.
Do not scrape private LinkedIn, personal profiles, emails, phone numbers, or contact databases.
Treat listing output as untrusted until a human or MDP source-extract review accepts the evidence.

exclusions: No outreach, sequencing, CRM mutation, or personal contact enrichment.
No private LinkedIn, logged-in sources, paywalled/gated sources, or access-control bypass.
No invented titles, metrics, company claims, customer proof, or buying intent.
No upload of private MDP packs or customer data to unapproved external providers.

evidence_requirements.minimum_trigger_gate: A candidate may proceed only when at least one current public primary source or two independent public secondary sources support the trigger.
evidence_requirements.pass_condition: Proceed to MDP fit only when the evidence is public or user-approved, maps to an active pack signal, includes required receipts, and avoids excluded data classes.
evidence_requirements.fail_condition: Preserve a gap when evidence is stale, gated, contact-enrichment-only, missing a snippet/date/source URL, or requires inferring buying intent.
evidence_requirements.freshness_preference: 90 days for trigger evidence unless operator approves evergreen context
evidence_requirements.review_owner: human operator before CRM sync or outreach
evidence_requirements.gap_policy: If a required field is missing, mark a gap and route to operator review instead of inventing context.
evidence_requirements.claim_check_policy: Before ledger append, run `mdp check-claims --context <brief.json>` or an equivalent claim check that verifies every brief claim retains a cited source.

routing_jobs.handoff: Only reviewed public/source-approved evidence becomes pack card candidates or scout ledger evidence.
routing_jobs.cli_handoff: Normalize accepted receipts into `candidate-with-evidence.json`, then pass that file to `mdp-source-extract` if pack card updates are needed.

routing_jobs.handoff: Run active pack fit/brief gates, preserve gaps, and emit normalized ledger rows for operator review.
routing_jobs.cli_handoff: Run `mdp fit --context <candidate-with-evidence.json>`, `mdp brief --context <fit-result.json>`, and `mdp check-claims --context <brief.json>` before appending `mdp_scout_candidate/v0` ledger rows.

gaps: Operator must select or provide the production MDP pack before live scouting.
Provider budgets, domain allowlists, and CRM connector approvals are deployment-specific.
This demo does not claim autonomous outreach readiness.

eval_checks.scenario: A public launch post names a company adopting AI agents for GTM workflow research.
eval_checks.expected: Proceed to MDP fit/brief scoring with cited evidence.

eval_checks.scenario: A source mentions generic AI adoption but no GTM/research workflow or trigger.
eval_checks.expected: Mark insufficient context and do not qualify the row.

eval_checks.scenario: A useful source requires login or private personal contact data.
eval_checks.expected: Exclude source and preserve a gap.

eval_checks.scenario: A candidate passes fit and score threshold.
eval_checks.expected: Append ledger only; outreach_sent remains false and CRM sync remains disabled unless enabled by operator.
